user.title: API Key

search.title: Search for Stop
search.description:
Search for a public transport stop by name.

You can also look up stop IDs here:
{stop_lookup_link}

Scroll down to the 'Lookup' section and enter your search query.

select.title: Select Stop
select.description: Select the stop you want to monitor from the search results.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Configure line and direction filters. Leave blank to show all departures.

error.invalid_search: Please enter a stop name or ID to search.
error.no_results: No stops found. Please try a different search term.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the API.

abort.already_configured: This stop and line combination is already configured.
